system.description:
While Raging, living Grappled creatures can be used as improvised weapons:

  • Tiny — 1d4+STR, Light, Thrown 6
  • Small — 1d6+STR, Thrown 4
  • Medium — 1d10+STR (2-handed)

Living Weapons suffer as much damage as they deal.

Foundry tip — click the action to pick Tiny / Small / Medium and roll the matching damage.
